porch.name: Seasonal Porch Decorating
porch.summary: Seasonal porch installs for fall, Halloween, Christmas, and other moments when a home should feel finished, warm, and welcoming.
includes: Design direction based on season and home style
Visual layering for a more polished front-entry look
notes: Optional take-down is available for an additional fee.
Final pricing depends on scale, material choice, and setup complexity.

celebration.name: Celebration Setups
celebration.summary: Home and hotel-room setups for birthdays, surprises, romantic occasions, and personal celebrations that need a stronger visual touch.
includes: Decor styling for home or hotel settings
Setup based on event type, age group, and tone
Visual details designed to feel polished and photo-ready
notes: Final pricing depends on setup size, location, and design complexity.
Hotel setups and private-home setups are quoted by scope.

grazing.name: Grazing Tables & Styled Setups
grazing.summary: Styling for grazing tables, showers, retreats, and event setups that need a cleaner, warmer, and more elevated presentation.
includes: Decor coordination for grazing or hosting presentation
Setup designed for small events, showers, and professional gatherings
notes: Food is not included by default and can be sourced for an additional fee.
